prestazioni: Replace the stock 4.2L XK6 inline-6 (engine code: 7.7L/4235cc, designation 'XK6 4.2') with a fully balanced and blueprinted version using forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Cosworth for 300+ HP at 6,000 RPM with 320 lb-ft of torque at 4,000 RPM, paired with a ported and polished cylinder head featuring oversized 2.14" intake and 1.65" exhaust valves from Ferrea Racing Components, and a custom camshaft profile from Kent Cams (280° duration, 0.450" lift) for optimized mid-to-high RPM power delivery.

Install a custom fuel system featuring a Holley HP EFI system with dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Aeromotive A1000 fuel pressure regulator, and 83 lb/hr injectors from Injector Dynamics, paired with a custom intake manifold fabricated from 304 stainless steel with individual throttle bodies (ITBs) from Jenvey Dynamics (45mm diameter) and a custom 3" velocity stack setup for improved airflow and throttle response.

Upgrade the drivetrain with a Tremec T56 Magnum 6-speed manual transmission conversion (using a custom bellhousing adapter from Rockett Brand Racing) paired with a twin-disc organic clutch from Spec Clutch (Stage 3+), a 3.54:1 limited-slip differential from Quaife, and a custom 3.5" driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop using 4340 chromoly steel for high-torque durability.
estetica: Replace the stock body panels with a custom widebody conversion kit from KBD Body Kits, featuring hand-laid carbon fiber fenders (2.5" wider in the front, 3" wider in the rear) with integrated vents for brake cooling, a custom front splitter from APR Performance (3" overhang with adjustable dive planes), and a custom rear diffuser from Seibon Carbon for improved aerodynamics and aggressive stance.

Install a custom suspension setup featuring a full coilover conversion from Ohlins (Road & Track DFV dampers with 8-position adjustable compression and rebound), paired with custom front and rear subframes from SNG Barratt (reinforced with TIG-welded gussets) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (95A durometer) for improved handling and reduced body roll, along with custom 17x9" and 17x10" wheels from BBS (LM-RSII, 5x120 PCD) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear).

Enhance the interior with a full custom retrim from Royal Steering Wheels, featuring a MOMO Prototipo 350mm steering wheel with Alcantara and carbon fiber trim, Recaro SPG XL seats (reclining and adjustable) upholstered in Bridge of Weir leather with custom embroidery, a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (T45 steel, bolt-in design with integrated harness bars), and a full digital dash conversion using an Aim MXS Strada display with integrated data logging and shift light.
